displayName: Merged Chart Time Series by Window
description: Live telemetry rows for the labeller chart using an explicit time window plus context padding.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH bounds AS (SELECT (:start_time)::timestamp - (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS context_start_ts, (:end_time)::timestamp + (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS context_end_ts), telemetry AS (SELECT CAST(t.name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(t.record_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, t.name AS well_name, t.record_ts AS timestamp, s.stage_num_td AS stage_num, t.rate_slurry, t.press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger ELSE t.prop_conc_blend_denso END AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor, 1 AS records_in_bucket FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 t CROSS JOIN bounds b LEFT JOIN featurestore:merged_td_stage_index_v1 s ON s.name = t.name AND t.record_ts >= CAST(s.stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AND t.record_ts <= CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) WHERE t.name = :well_name AND t.record_ts BETWEEN b.context_start_ts AND b.context_end_ts), boundary_points AS (SELECT CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) || ':context_start:' || CAST(context_start_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, context_start_ts AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, 0.0 AS context_anchor, 0 AS records_in_bucket FROM bounds UNION ALL SELECT CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) || ':context_end:' || CAST(context_end_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, context_end_ts AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, 0.0 AS context_anchor, 0 AS records_in_bucket FROM bounds) SELECT * FROM telemetry UNION ALL SELECT * FROM boundary_points ORDER BY timestamp) q
